task: Write an agent loop that takes a task description, generates a plan, executes steps, and reports results using effects
Write a multi-agent pipeline where a planner agent delegates subtasks to specialist worker agents and aggregates results

tests.input: v p = Pipeline.new(); p.plan("build a web app"); p.execute(); p.report()

task: Write a self-correcting code generation loop: generate, compile, fix errors, repeat until success or max retries
Write a tool registry that lets agents dynamically discover and invoke tools by name with JSON arguments
Write a conversation memory manager that stores, retrieves, and summarizes past interactions
Write a prompt template engine that supports variable substitution and conditional sections
Write a structured output parser that extracts typed fields from an LLM response using a schema definition
Write a capability-based sandbox that restricts which effects an agent can use at runtime
Write a reward/scoring function that evaluates generated code on correctness, efficiency, and style metrics
Write an SKB rule lookup engine that finds applicable rules given a code context and returns fix suggestions

tests.input: v e = SkbEngine.new(); e.load(Rule{id:"r1",category:"borrow",pattern:"&!",description:"exclusive ref",fix_template:"use {pattern}"}); e.query("v x: &!i32", "fn").len()
